title: dennstaedtia zeylanica
intro: Dennstaedtia zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon or Zeylan fern, is a species of fern native to Sri Lanka, but it is now found in various tropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Dennstaedtia zeylanica include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
